pr.title: Add ccg-router to LLMOps section
pr.body:
Adds [ccg-router](https://github.com/XZXY-AI/ccg-router) to the **LLMOps** section, alphabetically between BudgetML and Cheshire Cat AI.

It's a local Go daemon that serves Claude Code (Anthropic-compatible `/v1/messages`) and Codex CLI (OpenAI-compatible `/v1/chat/completions`) through one port. Sits in the same lane as `Glide` (also in this list) and `LiteLLM` for routing/proxying LLM traffic, but specifically targets the dual-CLI workflow (Claude Code + Codex CLI on the same machine) and writes a per-request row to a local SQLite ledger so developers can answer cost / usage questions without a hosted dashboard.

Three routing strategies: `prefer-cheaper`, `prefer-capable`, `round-robin`. Apache-2.0, single static Go binary.

The entry preserves the existing table format (Project / Details / Repository columns + shields.io stars badge).
pr.author: linny006
